SEARCH
Package org.atmosphere.cpr

Class InterceptorRegistry

java.lang.Object
org.atmosphere.cpr.InterceptorRegistry
public class InterceptorRegistry extends Object
Manages AtmosphereInterceptor registration, configuration, and lifecycle.

  • Method Details

    • addInterceptor

      public boolean addInterceptor(AtmosphereInterceptor c, boolean initialized)
      Add an AtmosphereInterceptor. The adding order will be used for invocation.

    • interceptors

      public LinkedList<AtmosphereInterceptor> interceptors()
      Return the list of AtmosphereInterceptors.

    • interceptor

      @Deprecated(since="4.0.0", forRemoval=false) public <T extends AtmosphereInterceptor> T interceptor(Class<T> c)
      Deprecated.
      Use findInterceptor(Class) which returns Optional instead of null.
      Find an AtmosphereInterceptor of the given type.

    • findInterceptor

      public <T extends AtmosphereInterceptor> Optional<T> findInterceptor(Class<T> c)
      Find an AtmosphereInterceptor of the given type.

      public void excludeInterceptor(String interceptor)
      Exclude an AtmosphereInterceptor from being added at startup.

      Return the list of excluded interceptor class names.

      Return the default interceptor classes.

      Configure interceptors from servlet init parameters and default list.

      Add all interceptors to all handler wrappers.

      Add framework interceptors and handler-specific interceptors to a wrapper.
